# Azerbaijan Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Last updated: 2026-06-17. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-District Data Files

- [Binagadi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/azerbaijan-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/binagadi.txt) — 6 settlements

| District | Settlements | 
|---|---|
